body: This PR updates the dependencies, including the latest version of Insolation.jl.
title: Update dependencies

body:
## Purpose 
Bumps ClimaAtmos to v0.12.0

This is needed for propagating the fix in the parser to the Coupler



## Content
- Bumped ClimaAtmos to v0.12.0



<!---

- checked that this PR does not duplicate an open PR.

In the Content, I have included

title: Bump ClimaAtmos version
